_comment: Issue #533: Agent left a comment saying '🟠 不在本轮范围 / 留开放'. Next sweep saw that as terminal and skipped forever. The fix: 'queued/留开放/不在本轮范围' comments are NON-TERMINAL and must be re-processed. Reference: issue-sweep SKILL.md Step 2 non-terminal pattern.

issue.body: Feature request: add retry logic to the build pipeline.

comments.body: This looks like a good enhancement!

> 🤖 AI Agent — issue-sweep 2026-05-20

🟠 不在本轮范围 / 留开放：这个 feature 需要架构决策，暂不在本轮处理。

expected.reason: Last comment is AI agent but contains '不在本轮范围 / 留开放' which matches the non-terminal deferred pattern. Must re-process this run — these 'I will do it later' comments must never freeze an issue.
